message:
feat(recorder): add RecorderEventReader/RecorderEventCursor seam for backend-neutral indexing

Defines RecorderEventReader and RecorderEventCursor traits in recorder_storage.rs
with CursorRecord type. Implements AppendLogEventSource in tantivy_ingest.rs wrapping
AppendLogReader. Adds run_with_reader() to IncrementalIndexer for backend-agnostic
pipeline. 10 new tests in recorder_storage, 10 new tests in tantivy_ingest.

Closes ft-2vuw7.1.4.1.2.1.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
